name: vscode-alpinejs-toolkit
description: Alpine.js IntelliSense tools: JavaScript syntax highlighting for x- attributes (comment-triggered or automatic), directive docs and autocompletion, $refs/$store/$magic suggestions, component file linking, snippets and template diagnostics.
author: Daniele De Pietri

enumDescriptions: Highlight x- attribute values as JavaScript only when the value starts with a marker comment such as `// js`.
Always highlight x- attribute values as JavaScript. Note: template tags (Twig, Jinja, etc.) inside attribute values will also be treated as JavaScript.
alpinejs.highlighting.mode.markdownDescription: Controls when the JavaScript syntax highlighting inside Alpine.js `x-` attribute values is applied. Changing this requires a window reload (you will be prompted).

alpinejs.snippets.structured.markdownDescription: Enable the opinionated, structured snippets (e.g. `x-if`/`x-for` expand to full `<template>` blocks, multi-line `x-data`, full `x-transition` stack).

alpinejs.snippets.basic.markdownDescription: Enable the basic single-attribute snippets for all Alpine.js directives and event/transition modifiers (e.g. `x-show`, `.prevent`, `.debounce`).

alpinejs.completions.magics.markdownDescription: Suggest Alpine.js magic properties (`$el`, `$refs`, `$store`, `$dispatch`, ...) when typing `$` inside attribute values.

alpinejs.completions.refs.markdownDescription: Suggest names defined with `x-ref="name"` in the current file when typing `$refs.`.

alpinejs.completions.stores.markdownDescription: Suggest store names registered with `Alpine.store('name', ...)` anywhere in the workspace when typing `$store.`.

alpinejs.completions.components.markdownDescription: Suggest component names registered with `Alpine.data('name', ...)` anywhere in the workspace when typing inside `x-data="..."`.

alpinejs.completions.events.markdownDescription: Pair `$dispatch('...')` with listeners: suggest listened event names inside `$dispatch('...')` and dispatched event names after `@`/`x-on:`. Scans workspace templates for custom events.

alpinejs.hovers.docs.markdownDescription: Show Alpine.js documentation on hover for directives and magic properties. Directive hovers apply outside plain HTML files (which already get them from the built-in HTML language service).

alpinejs.outline.components.markdownDescription: List Alpine.js components (`x-data`) in the file outline and breadcrumbs.

alpinejs.diagnostics.classShorthand.markdownDescription: Suggest Alpine's class object syntax when a `:class` ternary with an empty branch can be shortened, e.g. `:class="open ? 'is-open' : ''"` → `:class="{ 'is-open': open }"`. Sets the severity of the suggestion squiggle, or turns it off. A Quick Fix applies the rewrite.

alpinejs.diagnostics.templateRoot.markdownDescription: Severity of the check that a `<template x-if>` or `<template x-for>` contains exactly one root element, or `off` to disable it.

alpinejs.diagnostics.templateRequired.markdownDescription: Severity of the check that `x-if`, `x-for` and `x-teleport` are only used on `<template>` tags (Alpine silently ignores them elsewhere), or `off` to disable it.

alpinejs.diagnostics.missingComponent.markdownDescription: Severity of the check that an `x-data` component reference has a backing file somewhere in the workspace, or `off` to disable it.

alpinejs.languages.markdownDescription: Language ids the Alpine.js providers (completions, snippets, links, hovers, diagnostics) are active for. Syntax highlighting injection is independent of this setting.
